free_text: Proton induced fission of 243Am at 17.8 MeV:
Formation cross section for the fission products.
The 243Am target has isotopic purity of 99.998%.
Targets of  243Am(~40 microgram/cm2) were prepared by
electrodeposition from isopropyl alcohol medium on 0.3
The gamma ray counting of the fission products
was carried out on a 8% HPGe coupled to a 4096
The photo peak area of the gamma rays were used to
calculate the cross section for the fission products
Compiled by R.Ghosh, B.Jyrwa, NEHU, India
VS. SF5: CUM->M+ c.f. Memo CP-D/0986.
